title: Irradium Begone!
description: An addon to the mod Enlightend that removes Irradium from world generation.
body:
This datapack/mod disables the irradium ore from the mod Enlightend.

This will not delete the items or blocks from your world, only prevent the ore from generating naturally.

This was mod made so that people can play Enlightend and Alex's Caves without content overlap, as both mods add their own spins on uranium with radiation mechanics, nuclear furnaces, and nuclear TNT.

*(This mod requires Enlightend to work.)*
